title: US Long Bond Yield Hits Highest Since 2023 on Inflation Concern
summary: The yield on the US Treasury’s long-dated bond rose to the highest in almost three years as investor concern over accelerating inflation fueled a selloff in global debt.

title: Australia Orders Chinese Investors to Sell Rare Earth Stakes
summary: Australia’s government has ordered the biggest shareholders in rare earths firm Northern Minerals Ltd. to sell their stakes, the second such intervention in two years as Canberra seeks to protect the company from China-linked investors on national security grounds.
